turns.name: JOHN G. ROBERTS, JR.
turns.text: In Case No. 15-118, Hernandez versus Mesa, the judgment of the United States Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit is vacated and the case is remanded for further proceedings consistent with the per curiam opinion filed with the clerk. Justice Thomas has filed a dissenting opinion. Justice Breyer has filed a dissenting opinion in which Justice Ginsburg has joined. Justice Gorsuch took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
